similar_crash_fixes.subject: bugfix: avoid segmentation fault when Redcap tries to connect to gNB as NR_ServingCellConfig_t scd is NULL when Redcap does RA
similar_crash_fixes.author: Marius Tillner

similar_crash_fixes.subject: Fix segmentation fault when calling get_transformPrecoding function for BWP_id > 0 and rach_ConfigCommon = NULL
similar_crash_fixes.author: luis_pereira87

similar_crash_fixes.subject: fix a segfault when uci_01->harq is null
similar_crash_fixes.author: Mario Joa-Ng

similar_crash_fixes.subject: fix a crash (at this point "ue_context_p" is NULL,
similar_crash_fixes.author: Cedric Roux

similar_crash_fixes.subject: remove fixed size H_awgn_mimo that may cause segfault in simulator in case of more than 4 antennas
similar_crash_fixes.author: francescomani

suspected_functions.reason: Frame #0 crash point function where segmentation fault occurred at line 1065. It dereferences pointers such as rrcSetupRequest and msg without exhaustive NULL checks, decodes ASN.1 structures, and calls multiple downstream functions. Potential invalid or NULL pointers in rrcSetupRequest or msg could cause the crash.
suspected_functions.role: Called by crash function rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest - potential null/invalid call

suspected_functions.reason: Frame #1 immediate caller of rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest. It decodes the UL CCCH message and calls rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest with pointers extracted from ASN.1 decoding. If decoding is incorrect or pointers are invalid, it can propagate invalid data causing crash downstream.
suspected_functions.role: Calls crash function rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest - check parameter passing

suspected_functions.reason: Called by rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest to convert BIT_STRING to uint64_t. It assumes asn pointer is valid and does not check for NULL before dereferencing. If rrcSetupRequest->ue_Identity.choice.ng_5G_S_TMSI_Part1 is NULL or malformed, this can cause segfault.
suspected_functions.role: Called by crash function rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest - potential null/invalid call

suspected_functions.reason: Called by rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest to create UE context using parameters derived from rrcSetupRequest and msg. If it returns NULL or corrupts memory, subsequent dereferences in rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest can cause crash.
suspected_functions.role: Called by crash function rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest - potential null/invalid call

suspected_functions.reason: Called by rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest with UE pointer. It dereferences UE and its Srb array without NULL checks. If UE is NULL or Srb pointers invalid, it can cause segmentation fault.
suspected_functions.role: Called by crash function rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest - potential null/invalid call

suspected_functions.reason: Called by rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest to generate and send RRC Setup message. It accesses UE context and calls functions that expect valid pointers. Invalid UE context or buffers can cause crash.
suspected_functions.role: Called by crash function rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest - potential null/invalid call

suspected_functions.reason: Called by rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest in error scenarios (not shown fully). It accesses UE context and sends reject message. If UE context is invalid or NULL, it can cause crash.
suspected_functions.role: Called by crash function rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest - potential null/invalid call

suspected_functions.reason: Upstream function that calls rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest indirectly and manipulates UE context and ASN.1 structures. Potentially relevant if UE context or ASN.1 structures are corrupted.
suspected_functions.role: Calls crash function rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest - check parameter passing

suspected_functions.reason: Another upstream caller that handles initial UL RRC messages and calls rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest. It performs ASN.1 decoding and passes pointers that if invalid can cause crash downstream.
suspected_functions.role: Calls crash function rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest - check parameter passing

fix_suggestion.reason: The segmentation fault is caused by missing NULL pointer checks on critical pointers such as rrcSetupRequest, msg, and nested ASN.1 structures before dereferencing in rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest and its caller rrc_gNB_process_initial_ul_rrc_message. Also, BIT_STRING_to_uint64 assumes a valid pointer without NULL check. These missing validations allow NULL or invalid pointers to be dereferenced, causing the crash.

code_patches.description: Add NULL pointer checks for rrcSetupRequest and msg at the start of rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest to prevent dereferencing NULL pointers.
Add NULL check for randomValue.buf before memcpy to avoid dereferencing NULL.
Add NULL check for ng_5G_S_TMSI_Part1.buf before calling BIT_STRING_to_uint64 to avoid dereferencing NULL.
Add NULL check for ul_rrc parameter at function entry to prevent dereferencing NULL.
Add NULL pointer check for asn and asn->buf at start of BIT_STRING_to_uint64 to prevent dereferencing NULL.
Add NULL check for UE pointer at start of activate_srb to prevent dereferencing NULL.

fix_suggestion.root_cause_analysis: The crash occurs due to dereferencing NULL pointers in rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest and its caller functions. The code lacks defensive NULL pointer checks for critical input parameters and nested ASN.1 buffers before usage. Additionally, BIT_STRING_to_uint64 assumes valid input without NULL checks. Adding these checks prevents invalid memory access and segmentation faults.
investigation_steps: Step 1: Reviewed all suspected functions for NULL pointer assignments and found none setting pointers to NULL before use.
Step 2: Identified missing NULL pointer validation before dereferencing critical pointers in rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest and rrc_gNB_process_initial_ul_rrc_message.
Step 3: Added defensive NULL checks in these functions and in BIT_STRING_to_uint64 and activate_srb to prevent segmentation faults.

investigation_commands.hint: Verify the implementation and recent changes in the RRCSetupRequest handling function for potential issues
Capture SCTP packets on port 500 to monitor RRCSetupRequest messages and check for malformed or missing data
